title: Prefectory of Yuuzhan'tar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Prefectory of Yuuzhan'tar''' was the building for the [[Intendant caste|intendants]] charged with the day-to-day matters of running [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]].

After he was [[Escalation|escalated]] to [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect of Yuuzhan'tar]], [[Nom Anor]]'s offices were located in the Prefectory, with a balcony overlooking the [[Square of Hierarchy]]. Nom Anor was in his offices when [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] arrived in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
